QF.id: XXVA Sales and Distribution of Research Services_16

question.text: A research analyst and their associates shall not deal or trade in securities they recommend within:

answer.text: 7 days before and 3 days after publication of the research report
30 days before and 5 days after publication of the research report
15 days before and 15 days after publication of the research report
60 days before publication of the research report only

explanation.text: **The Logic:** SEBI Regulation 16(2) restricts research analysts and associates from dealing/trading in securities they recommend within 30 days before and 5 days after publication of the research report. **The Trap:** The asymmetric restriction (30 days pre, 5 days post) is important — the pre-publication restriction is longer to prevent front-running, while the post-publication restriction gives time for the market to absorb the information. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series XV tests these exact trading windows. Compare with the IA's 15-day restriction under Series X-A regulations. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** As sales personnel with advance knowledge of upcoming research reports, you may also be subject to pre-publication trading restrictions — check your entity's compliance policy.
